SYSTEM_OVERRIDE: INITIATING RECONNAISSANCE PROTOCOL ᚠ
You materialize in the Merchandise Store Room.
--- COMMAND REFERENCE ---
help :: show the current command reference. | aliases: commands, ?
undo :: revert the last dispatched turn. | aliases: u
look :: scan the current room, exits, entities, and interactables. | aliases: l
go [dir] :: travel to a connected room. | aliases: n, s, e, w
ask [question] :: consult the Loom of Fate.
stage [knowledge|conflict|endings] :: shift the oracle stage.
shop :: inspect available wares. | aliases: wares, trade, t
buy [ware] :: purchase an item, spell, or upgrade.
sell [relic] :: liquidate scavenged loot.
attack :: attack the current hostile target. | aliases: fight, c
cast [spell] :: cast a known spell. | aliases: m
interact [object] :: examine or activate an environmental object.
use [item] :: use an inventory item. | aliases: consume
inventory :: show carried relics and consumables. | aliases: i
profile :: show player stats, spells, upgrades, and companions. | aliases: p
rest :: recover HP and advance tension. | aliases: r
save :: write a backup save to ~/.quadar_save.json.
load :: restore the latest backup save.
quests :: show active quest progress and focus. | aliases: objectives, o
notes :: show scene, thread, and NPC notes. | aliases: journal, facts, j
scene :: inspect the current scene card. | aliases: sc
frame [thread#] [stage] :: set the active scene thread and stage.
framework [show|theme|hook|phase|next] :: inspect or adjust the vignette framework. | aliases: arc
minds [show|focus|ban|note|rm] :: inspect or update the Meeting of Minds accord. | aliases: meeting, accord
party [show|fade|send|rally] :: inspect or reposition companions. | aliases: companions
npc [list|add|rm] :: manage scene-present NPCs.
thread [list|add|mod|split|replace|rm] :: inspect or revise the thread ledger.
aside [thread#] [fact] :: record a sidebar fact on another thread.
fade [summary] :: close the current scene with an outcome.
montage [summary] :: fast-forward through intervening action.

framework.hook: Kamenal needs a live witness who knows what the tower is doing to the recruits.
framework.name: Vignette
framework.theme: Recover the missing rangers from Qua'dar Tower.

facts: Kamenal begins in the Merchandise Store Room under orders to recover missing rangers.
thread_cards.name: Find Missing Rangers

quests.objective: Locate stranded ranger operatives and open a route back through Quadar Tower.
quests.target_hint: Search newly opened sectors for bound recruits, distress beacons, and field caches.
quests.title: Rescue the Missing Rangers

abyssal_void.desc: The void that invaded once-holy grounds. The sacredness of the Ethereal Towerlands has given way to the blackness of heavenly damnation.
abyssal_void.name: ᛟ ABYSSAL_VOID ᛟ

objects.desc: A swirling vortex of dark energy that warps time, tension, and direction.
objects.name: Void Rift

hallway.desc: A narrow passage of obsidian stone, crystallized in extraterrestrial resonance. The air hums with chthonic frequencies pulsating from the core.
hallway.name: ᚢ UMBRAL_REACH_CORRIDOR ᚢ

marshes.desc: Once lush landscapes now enveloped by poisonous Abyssal Murk. Great furrowing depths of endless ooze and medieval torture.
marshes.name: ᚨ ETHEREAL_MARSHES ᚨ

nexus.desc: A bunker-like emporium, a maggot pile within the starry settlement of Quadar Tower. Shadows dance with the echoes of ancient electronic goth logic. You preside over this emporium, brokering eldritch artifacts.
nexus.name: ᚠ MERCHANDISE_STORE_ROOM ᚠ

objects.desc: A flickering terminal detailing recent shipments, missing operatives, and scavenged codices.
objects.name: Arcane Terminal

spire_base.desc: The indomitable tower stands as a testament to long-ago awakening. Colossal structure vibrating with low magic of corrupt watchers. Neon blurs in the Abyssal Murk.
spire_base.name: ᚦ BASTION_OF_THE_SPIRE ᚦ

objects.desc: A heavy stone mechanism covered in sigils and linked to hidden passages in the tower shell.
objects.name: Chthonic Lever
